summary: Frontend-only testing for Privacy Mode, Change PIN button, Login Page theme and blinking. All 4 features verified working correctly.

features_tested.details: Deep purple gradient background (#1a1a2e, #2d1b4e, #3d2066) on left panel. Cyan accent text (#22D3EE) for 'Customer Experiences'. Violet-themed UI elements (22 found). Purple gradient sign-in button. All working as designed.
Two screenshots taken 1 second apart show identical stable rendering. No re-render or blinking issues observed.

Toggle with data-testid='privacy-mode-toggle' found and working. When enabled: 13 elements get blur-sm class, values show as '₹••••••', chart shows 'Chart data hidden in Privacy Mode' message. When disabled: all values visible again (₹8,475, ₹3,683, etc.).

features_tested.feature: Change PIN Button in My Profile Modal
features_tested.details: Button with data-testid='change-pin-btn' found. Clicking it sets showPinSetup=true and reveals PIN input form with data-testid='profile-pin-input' and data-testid='profile-confirm-pin-input'. Cancel and Update PIN buttons also appear.

critical_code_review_comments: Privacy Mode implementation is complete with maskValue() and maskCurrency() functions
Login page purple theme properly implemented with gradient background and cyan accent
Change PIN button onClick handler correctly sets showPinSetup(true) at line 388-390
All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page has purple/violet theme with deep purple gradient (#1a1a2e to #3d2066) and cyan accent (#22D3EE). Privacy Mode toggle on Sales Dashboard works - adds blur-sm class to 13 sensitive elements when enabled. Change PIN button in My Profile modal at line 381-397 reveals PIN input form. Superadmin user has existing PIN set (shows 'Active' badge).
